given: scripts/score-update.sh is read and EVENT_DELTAS dict is parsed
when: all positive delta values are enumerated across all events and all agent roles
then: max positive delta is +5; all negative deltas identical to pre-change values; specific values match: close_success_qa_pass={dev:5,ba:3,qa:3}, close_success_qa_fail_fixed={dev:5,ba:3,qa:2}, qa_first_pass={dev:2,ba:1,qa:0}, qa_second_pass={dev:1,ba:0,qa:0}, user_rating_5={dev:1,ba:0,qa:0}

when: lines containing parenthetical delta comments are searched
then: zero matches for old values '(dev +15' or '(ba +8, qa +8)'; updated comments reflect new M1 values

given: commands/close.md user rating section is read
then: (a) AskUserQuestion is NOT used for rating; (b) an <options> XML block is present with all 6 choices (5/4/3/2/1/Skip); (c) each <option> has a machine-readable value attribute (value="5" through value="1" and value="skip"); (d) the block appears after the session summary and verdict in /close text output (NOT in close-report file); (e) post-option handling contract: task-id retained in orchestrator context, next user selection triggers three score-update.sh --event user_rating_<N> calls (for ba, dev, qa), value="skip" triggers no score-update.sh calls

given: commands/close.md Step 3 CLOSE:YES path is read
when: the session summary section is inspected
then: a mandatory Session Summary section exists that instructs the orchestrator to produce a self-summary BEFORE the rating <options> block; summary covers: accomplished, not accomplished, needs satisfied, needs not satisfied, bugs encountered, improvement opportunities

given: agents/changelog-analyst.md normal mode (BULK=false) workflow is read
then: when BULK=false AND dev-report exists, candidate set is restricted to files_modified UNION files_created UNION cycle artifacts; staged-file count guard exists (abort if count exceeds files_modified.length + files_created.length + 30); when no dev-report exists, graceful fallback with WARNING; BULK=true behavior unchanged

given: agents/changelog-analyst.md normal mode (BULK=false) workflow is read
then: (a) files NOT in dev-report files_modified/files_created AND NOT matching the anchored task-id artifact whitelist (per M5 enumerated patterns: ticket-<TASK_ID>.md, context-<TASK_ID>.json, etc.) are classified as foreign_session_candidate and excluded from staging with warning; (b) dev-report is used as primary staging whitelist; (c) when dev-report exists but baseline_head_sha is absent, the whitelist and foreign-session exclusion still apply (only the provenance sanity check is skipped); (d) when no dev-report exists at all, staging falls back to current stage-everything behavior with WARNING; (e) BULK=true unchanged
